raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes based on user acquisition and retention impact", "rationale": "Fixing errors that directly affect user experience and assessment accuracy will have the biggest impact on user acquisition and retention. This includes issues related to AURA score calculation, assessment UX, and org admin experience.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed fixes may lead to user frustration, decreased engagement, and negative word-of-mouth, ultimately affecting the project's reputation and growth.", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on user acquisition and retention impact
rationale: Fixing errors that directly affect user experience and assessment accuracy will have the biggest impact on user acquisition and retention. This includes issues related to AURA score calculation, assessment UX, and org admin experience.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed fixes may lead to user frustration, decreased engagement, and negative word-of-mouth, ultimately affecting the project's reputation and growth.
